title: 3 Low-Beta Dividend Stocks to Reduce Portfolio Volatility
text: Investors need to be aware of the volatility of their stocks. Owning too many high-volatility positions can create a scenario in which your portfolio loses more than the S&P 500 index during bear markets.

title: NY's Con Edison building 1,500-MW Brooklyn hub to plug into offshore wind
text: New York's Con Edison on Tuesday said it has broken ground on a transmission substation project, the Brooklyn Clean Energy Hub, to strengthen the region's power grid by serving as a plug-in point for future offshore wind power.

title: Con Edison to Attend Barclays CEO Energy-Power Conference, September 7
text: NEW YORK , Sept. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) (NYSE: ED) executives will meet with investors at the Barclays CEO Energy-Power Conference in New York City on September 7, 2023.
